scope: ACL main-paper round 9 visual/prose iteration for page-9 Discussion, Conclusion, and Limitations rhythm.

source_changes.summary: Replaced generic short run-in labels with Protocol, not leaderboard; Contracts before deltas; Boundaries as method.
Compressed the conclusion into a single burden-of-proof paragraph that fits in the left column on page 9.

visual_findings.notes: The final page keeps Discussion and the complete short Conclusion in the left column; Limitations starts at the top of the right column without stray Conclusion text above it.
Figure 4, caption, Ethical Considerations, and References remain readable and non-overlapping.

verification.command: rg -n "Overfull|Float too large|too large|LaTeX Warning: Float|LaTeX Warning: Reference|Warning:.*Label|undefined|Rerun to get|Label\\(s\\) may have changed|Package lineno Warning" paper/venues/acl27/build/main.log
